MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENDON, ALICIA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-24-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-30-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUN-21-1993, OFF CALENDAR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED.

DEPT. #7, GAIL HILLEBRAND, JUDGE PRO TEM C/C AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. STIPULATION REACHED. TERMS: POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 758 18TH AVE, SAN FRANCISCO. WRIT MAY ISSUED BUT STAYED UNTIL 7/15/93 IF DEFT. COMPLIED W/ FF: $7650- CASH OR CERTIFIED FUNDS TO BE PAID TO L/O THEDOROE H. LONGS, PLTF'S. ATTY AT 428 PENINSULA AVE, #42952, SAN MATEO, CA 94401. DEFT.TO VACATE BY 8/15/93. IF DEFT. FAILED TO PERFORM AS STATED, PLTF'S. ATTY MAY FILE A DECL W/ THE COURT & IMMED. EXEC. ON THE WRIT OF POSS. & JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $7650-DAMAGES AS RENT.
DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION AT SETTLEMENT CONF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTANO, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 758 18TH AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $7,650.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,650.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
